summary: Backend: 16/16 pytest tests pass (public endpoints, auth for all 3 admins, JWT-protected CRUD on messages and schedule, no _id leakage, 35-item seeded schedule sorted by date/time, welcome message seeded). Frontend: Expo web preview loads cleanly on 390x844 viewport with zero page errors. Hero '25–30 July 2026' with Edinburgh skyline renders; day chips FRI 25 / SAT 26 / MON 27 / TUE 28 / WED 29 / THU 30 visible; session cards (e.g. Registration & Welcome Reception @ Marriott) with bookmark icon render; 4 bottom tabs (Schedule, Messages, City Guide, Profile) all navigate; Profile shows 'Delegate', 'My Agenda' with 'No saved sessions yet' empty state and 'Admin sign-in' entry; City Guide shows hero + Essentials grid (Currency, Plugs & Power, Tipping, Emergencies); Messages tab loads the seeded Welcome message.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings (non-fatal): 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Cosmetic only.

action_items: Optional: replace shadow* style props with boxShadow and props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents to clear RN-Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('startup') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handler. Not blocking — works correctly here.
passlib bcrypt backend logs a benign warning about reading bcrypt version on startup (AttributeError: __about__). Does not affect hashing/verification — all 3 admin logins succeed.
seed_data_creation: None created. Backend auto-seeds 35 schedule items, 1 welcome message, and 3 admins on startup. All TEST_ data created during tests was deleted in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_setp_api.py covers all critical flows and can be re-run as regression: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_setp_api.py -v`. Frontend smoke confirmed Schedule, Messages, City Guide, Profile tabs render with correct content. Login modal, compose-FAB POST flow, bookmark toggle, day-chip filtering were NOT exercised via Playwright due to token budget — backend endpoints behind them are verified, and Profile shows the Admin sign-in entry, so main agent can self-validate these UI-only interactions.
